trust.title: Your data, your control
trust.body: Guest mode stores everything locally on your device. Nothing is sent to a server. When you're ready for a full experience, personalized mode will sync securely across devices.
trust.point1: No account required for guest mode

landing.privacyNote: We respect your privacy. Guest data never leaves your device.

anmeldungDeadline.description: Register within two weeks of moving in.

explore.title: Explore topics

generalDocs.title: Document checklist
generalDocs.description: Standard documents for most Ausländer appointments.

fallback.heading: Details
fallback.body: Select a card to load detailed guidance.

eligibility.heading: Eligibility checklist
eligibility.body: Requirements vary by visa type and city, but these are the most common criteria.
eligibility.item1: Valid passport for entire permit period

documents.heading: Required documents
documents.body: Bring originals plus copies. Missing items can delay your appointment.

process.heading: Application steps
process.step1: Book an appointment at your Ausländerbehörde
process.step4: Receive Fiktionsbescheinigung if processing takes time

appointment.heading: Booking your appointment
appointment.body: Appointments are city-specific. Book early — slots fill quickly.
appointment.tip1: Check your city's online appointment system first
appointment.tip2: Have your passport number ready when booking

fees.heading: Typical fees
fees.body: Fees depend on permit type and duration. Payment is usually at the appointment.
fees.item2: Extensions and special cases may cost more

mistakes.heading: Avoid these common mistakes
mistakes.body: These are the most frequent reasons for delays or second appointments.
mistakes.item1: Missing Anmeldung before your Ausländer appointment

timeline.heading: Typical timeline
timeline.body: Timelines vary by city workload and your case complexity.

anmeldungWhat.heading: City registration (Anmeldung)
anmeldungWhat.body: You must register your address at the Bürgeramt within 14 days of moving in. You'll receive a Meldebescheinigung — needed for bank accounts, permits, and more.

anmeldungDeadline.heading: The 14-day rule
anmeldungDeadline.body: Registration is legally required within two weeks of moving into your new address.
anmeldungDeadline.tip: Late registration can result in fines in some cities.
